descs.desc:
[WhenUse] If target has 5+ [Sinking], Clash Power +1
[WhenUse] If target has 3+ [Sinking] Count, Coin Power +1

coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 2 [EchoOfMansion] next turn
[OnSucceedAttack] If target has [EchoOfMansion], inflict +3 [Sinking] Count

descs.desc: [WhenUse] If target has 5+ [Sinking] Count, Coin Power +2
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 2 [EchoOfMansion] next turn
[OnSucceedAttack] If target has [EchoOfMansion], inflict +3 [Sinking] Count

1020901.name: Butler Style Response
1020901.desc: - Clash Win: inflict 1 [Sinking] on target (3 times per turn)

1020911.name: Butler Style Response
1020911.desc:
- Clash Win: inflict 1 [Sinking] on target (3 times per turn)
- If the target has [EchoOfMansion], inflict 3 [Sinking] instead

1020921.name: Anticipatory Training
1020921.desc: When 1 ally with the least SP hits an enemy with 5+ [Sinking], the ally heals 2 SP On Hit (4 times per turn)

1020931.name: Anticipatory Training
1020931.desc: When 1 ally with the least SP hits an enemy with 5+ [Sinking], the ally heals 3 SP On Hit (4 times per turn)
